import_tract_classifications.description: Read an ngsTracts tract_classifications.tsv (per ngsTracts/docs/METHODOLOGY.md §5.1) and emit a staging_tract_classifications_v0 layer. Producer-side ngsTracts is unchanged; this action bridges its output into the layer envelope contract.

normalize_tract_classifications.description: Promote a staging_tract_classifications_v0 envelope to a typed tract_classifications_v1 envelope. Reads target.source_layer_id from the workspace layers index, coerces types (int/float/bool, '-' null sentinel), and emits per-class counts in summary. Mirrors relatedness atlas's normalize_relatedness pattern.

import_chromosome_meiosis_events.description: Read a per-(chromosome × dyad) event-count TSV (CO/DCO/NCO counts + chrom_len_bp + optional karyotype_at_focal_inv stratification) and emit a staging_chromosome_meiosis_events_v0 layer. Producer is a (per SPEC_crossovers_page.md §3.1) aggregation script over ngsTracts tract_classifications.tsv + ngsPedigree Stage 3 dyad_event_rates.tsv. Shares import_tsv runner with tract_classifications — distinguished by schema_in + the matched typed extractor.

normalize_chromosome_meiosis_events.description: Promote a staging_chromosome_meiosis_events_v0 envelope to a typed chromosome_meiosis_events_v1 envelope. Reads target.source_layer_id from the workspace layers index, coerces types (int/float, karyotype enum), derives co_per_mb / dco_per_mb when absent, and emits sum counts + karyotype_strat_rows in summary. Twin of normalize_tract_classifications.

import_local_inv_controls.description: Read a per-(tested chrom × local inversion) covariate TSV (filtered subset of inversion_candidates.v1) and emit a staging_local_inv_controls_v0 layer. Shares the import_tsv runner with the other two meiosis adapters — distinguished by schema_in + matched typed extractor. See SPEC_local_inv_controls_adapter.md.

normalize_local_inv_controls.description: Promote a staging_local_inv_controls_v0 envelope to a typed local_inv_controls_v1 envelope. Reads target.source_layer_id from the workspace layers index, coerces types (int / float / frequency ∈ [0,1] / ascertainment enum), derives length_bp when absent, and emits chrom-distinct counts + mean_inv_per_chrom in summary. Twin of normalize_tract_classifications + normalize_chromosome_meiosis_events.

import_family_aware_permutation_design.description: Read a per-(focal_inversion × parent) permutation-design TSV (joined from family_hubs.v1 + inversion_karyotypes.v1) and emit a staging_family_aware_permutation_design_v0 layer. Shares the import_tsv runner with the other meiosis adapters. See SPEC_family_aware_permutation_design_adapter.md.

normalize_family_aware_permutation_desig.description: Promote a staging_family_aware_permutation_design_v0 envelope to a typed family_aware_permutation_design_v1 envelope. Coerces identifiers + karyotype enum, drops rows missing any of {focal_inversion_id, parent_id, family_id, karyotype, permutation_block}, computes n_singleton_blocks for the consumer's degeneracy diagnostic, and emits aggregate karyotype counts. Twin of the other three meiosis normalize actions.

import_coincidence_matrix.description: Read a per-(chrom × interval_a × interval_b) coefficient-of-coincidence TSV and emit a staging_coincidence_matrix_v0 layer. Shares the import_tsv runner with the other meiosis adapters. Last of the four builders the interchromosomal page depends on. See SPEC_coincidence_matrix_adapter.md.

normalize_coincidence_matrix.description: Promote a staging_coincidence_matrix_v0 envelope to a typed coincidence_matrix_v1 envelope. Coerces identifiers + non-negative floats + karyotype enum, drops rows missing chrom / interval_a_id / interval_b_id, derives c_coincidence = r_ab / (r_a * r_b) when producer omits it (and inputs are valid), flags rows with c > params.neg_interference_threshold (default 3.0) as artefact-likely, and emits mean/median c + flag counts in summary. Fifth meiosis normalize action.

compute_nco_inside_vs_outside_inversion.description: CHAIN action — promoted from browser JS (atlases/meiosis/pages/hub/nco.js renderInVsOut). Reads a tract_classifications_v1 envelope by source_layer_id, builds the 2x2 crosstab of {target_class, default=MOSAIC_SHORT} x inside_inversion across NCO-like tracts, runs Fisher exact (two-sided + one-sided-greater) via runners.meiosis_nco_enrichment, and emits a typed nco_enrichment_result_v1 envelope. First chain bloc whose backing module is no longer stale (promotion_from_browser_js) — catalogue brain can now dispatch this chain directly.

compute_intrachromosomal_co_karyotype_ef.description: CHAIN action — promoted from browser JS (atlases/meiosis/pages/hub/crossovers.js karyo_strat view). Reads a karyotype-stratified chromosome_meiosis_events_v1 envelope by source_layer_id, splits per-dyad CO_per_mb by karyotype_at_focal_inv (het vs non-het), runs Welch's two-sample t per chromosome via runners.meiosis_intrachromosomal_co (hand-rolled t-CDF via incomplete beta, no scipy dep), and emits a typed intrachromosomal_co_effect_v1 envelope. Flags chromosomes with rate_ratio_het_over_non_het < flag_threshold (default 0.7) — the manuscript intrachromosomal-suppression signal. Second chain bloc promoted out of browser JS.
